originalTitle: Sexual violence increasingly used as 'weapon of war' in Sudan, UN says
title: Sexual violence increasingly used as 'weapon of war' in Sudan, UN says
content: The scale and brutality of the sexual attacks is unprecedented and aimed at terrorising communities, the UN says.

title: Zambia ex-president's family wins latest legal battle over what should happen to his body
content: Edgar Lungu's family and the Zambian government remained in dispute 12 months after he died.

title: Niger pulls out of International Criminal Court after calling it neo-colonialist
content: Niger, along with Mali and Burkina Faso, had called the ICC an "instrument of neo-colonialist repression".

title: Massive fire rips through Indonesia sandal factory

content: Following the start of the US-Israel war on Iran on February 28, Tehran had effectively closed off the vital waterway.

originalTitle: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
content: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
content: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

title: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
content: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.

originalTitle: Deschamps returns to France after death of his mother
title: Deschamps returns to France after death of his mother
content: France head coach Didier Deschamps will miss his side's final World Cup group game following the death of his mother, the French Football Federation confirms.

originalTitle: Chelsea close in on Palestra as Alonso's first signing
title: Chelsea Gets a New Football Friend: Meet Marco!
content:
Hello, super sports fans and little champions of Africa! Are you ready for some very exciting football news? We have a big story about a famous football team called Chelsea. They play in England, far away from us, but many of us love watching them!

Big News for Chelsea!

Chelsea is getting a brand new player! His name is Marco Palestra. It's like when you make a new friend join your favorite game at school. Everyone is excited to welcome Marco to the team. He is a young man who plays football very well.

Who is Chelsea?

Chelsea is a very big football club. They wear blue shirts and play in a big stadium. Many years ago, they won a very special trophy called the Champions League. It's like winning the biggest prize in football! They have many fans all around the world, including here in Africa. Many kids dream of playing for a team like Chelsea one day. Did you know? Chelsea's home is in a city called London in England! It's a very big city, full of many people and famous places.

Meet Marco Palestra!

So, who is Marco Palestra? Marco is a football player. He is quite young, and he is very good at what he does. Before joining Chelsea, Marco played for another team called Atalanta. This team is from a country called Italy. Italy is also far away from us, but it's famous for delicious pizza and pasta! Marco's job on the field is very important. He is a defender.

What Does a Defender Do?

A defender is like a superhero who protects the goal! Imagine your team is playing, and the other team is trying to score. The defender's job is to stop them. They run fast, they kick the ball away, and they make sure the other team cannot get too close to their goal. It's a very important job, because without good defenders, it would be easy for the other team to score goals all the time. Did you know? Football is played with two teams, and each team tries to kick the ball into the other team's net to score a goal! The team with more goals wins.

Moving to a New Team

When a player like Marco joins a new team, we say he is 'signing' for them. It means he has agreed to play for Chelsea now. He will wear their blue shirt and play with his new teammates. It's a big change for Marco, moving to a new country and a new team. But it's also a very exciting adventure! It's like when you move to a new school. You meet new friends, learn new things, and play new games. Marco will practice with his new team, learn new ways to play, and try his best to win games.

A New Coach Too!

Guess what? Chelsea also has a new head coach! His name is Mr. Alonso. A coach is like a teacher for the football team. Mr. Alonso will help all the players, including Marco, play even better. He will teach them new strategies and help them work together as a strong team. Marco will be one of the first new players that Mr. Alonso brings to the team. This is a very special thing! Did you know? Good coaches are very important for a football team. They help players grow and learn, just like your teachers help you in school!

Big Money for a Player

To get Marco to join their team, Chelsea is going to pay a lot of money to his old team, Atalanta. The news says it is a very, very big amount of money. It is more money than you can even count! This shows how much Chelsea wants Marco to play for them. It shows they think he is a very talented player who can help them win many games. Did you know? Football is the most popular sport in the whole wide world! Millions of people love to watch it and play it.

Why This is Exciting for Chelsea

Bringing Marco to Chelsea is very exciting because it means the team is getting stronger. A strong team can win more games and make their fans very happy. Marco will help Chelsea try to win trophies again. Every player brings something special to a team, and Marco's skills as a defender will be a big help. We hope Marco settles in well and has a fantastic time playing for Chelsea. Maybe one day, some of you amazing kids will also play football for big teams and make your dreams come true! Football is all about teamwork, trying your best, and having fun. So keep practicing your kicks and passes, and who knows, maybe we'll be reporting about you one day! Thank you for listening to our exciting football news. Stay tuned for more adventures from the world of sports!
summary: Chelsea, a big football team, is getting a new young player named Marco Palestra, a defender from Italy, and their new coach Mr. Alonso is excited to have him join the team.
whyMatters: This is important because Marco will help Chelsea's team become stronger and try to win more games, which makes all their fans happy, and it's exciting to see new players join big teams.
